CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP 'a.*';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '^a';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '.*b.*';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '^[a-z]+$';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '^[^a].*';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP 'a{1,}';
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP 'abc|xyz';
SELECT * FROM (SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP 'a.*') AS subquery WHERE subquery.value REGEXP '123';
CREATE TABLE more_strings (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT ts.* FROM test_strings ts JOIN more_strings ms ON ts.value REGEXP '^a' AND ms.value REGEXP '^b';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '^[a-z]+$' AND value REGEXP 'c$';
SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '.*e$';
